title: Glaiden's Vista improvements
description: Mod that adds some improvements to Vista mod
body:
This Mod right now adds 3 things:

1.Rectengular Screens 
now TV form is not limited with squares

![screens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3faca2440c1fdb726e083e2d26f96e071759a357.png)

2.Custom Cassetes making ingame
No more Requierements for data pack and resource pack, just create blank URL Cassete, insert it into Cassete Maker, paste link, choose color and you are done! 

![gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88926a088e055f058c3dbece6739d45783c64c9f.png)

**[Join our Discord!](https://discord.gg/4hBpB59qS6)**
